creator: breno.leitao@gmail.com
text:
I am hitting the exact same issue on two other investigations I am doing:

https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=225323
and
https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=224841

On these two bugs, I am using just HEAD and it seems that the changes came with the new NUMA patchset.
